audit_summary.summary_text: The data-pipeline skill performs local data transformation (CSV/JSON read-filter-transform-write) with Base64 encoding for binary-safe representation. All operations are local file I/O with no network transmission, credential access, env variable harvesting, or hidden directives. The Base64 usage is transparent, documented in the operations table, and used solely for encoding field values into the output JSON — not to obfuscate code or exfiltrate data. No shadow features were detected: every function in the implementation corresponds to an operation declared in the SKILL.md operations table.
